name: Open Zoom
description: Launch Zoom if it is not already running
triggers: When Zoom is not yet open

name: Start meeting and join configured
description: Zoom's main window is open; start a meeting via the app menu bar (the home screen's New Meeting icon is not exposed to accessibility -- it renders as a single unclickable image, not real buttons), then on the pre-join screen mute audio and turn off video before joining. Do all of this in one continuous sequence, in order -- do not click Start until after both toggle buttons are clicked.
triggers: When Zoom is open and the 'Zoom Workplace' menu bar item is visible
actions: Click the 'Zoom Workplace' menu bar item to open the app menu
Wait for the pre-join preview window to appear
Click the button whose title contains 'Audio, turn off' to mute the microphone
Click the button whose title contains 'Video, turn off' to turn off the camera
Click the 'Start' button to enter the meeting

name: Wait then terminate
description: The in-meeting window is visible; wait briefly then stop (ending the meeting is handled separately)
triggers: When the in-meeting window is visible
